title: V6 custom subgraphs use getResolvers(subgraph: BaseSubgraph) pattern with access to reactorClient and relationalDb
content: In v6, custom subgraphs changed from exporting `resolvers` with `ctx.driveServer` to exporting `getResolvers(subgraph: BaseSubgraph)` with `subgraph.reactorClient` and `subgraph.relationalDb`. Schema format changed from template literal strings to `gql` tagged templates (`DocumentNode`). File structure changed from `resolvers.ts` + `type-defs.ts` to `resolvers.ts` + `schema.ts` + `index.ts`. Registration changed from manual to automatic via `ph generate --subgraph <name>`. The reactor subgraph at `/graphql/r` is the generic entry point; document-model subgraphs provide type-specific namespaced access.
description: Custom subgraphs export getResolvers receiving BaseSubgraph with reactorClient/relationalDb, replacing legacy ctx.driveServer pattern.
